title: Herd
description: Specifies herd spawning configuration. Can be a single herd object or an array of herd objects.

herd_definition.title: Herd Definition
herd_definition.description: Configures group spawning behavior, including minimum and maximum herd size. Allows running events on the first N spawns or after M spawns.

event.description: An event to run after M number of the herd have spawned.

event_skip_count.description: Number of the herd to skip before running the event.

initial_event.description: Event run for the first N of the herd that are placed.

initial_event_count.description: Number of times that the initial event will run.

max_size.description: Maximum number in this group to attempt to spawn.

min_size.description: Minimum number in this group to attempt to spawn.
